name: plugin-recommender
description: Recommend Codex plugins and skills from a local Korean catalog.

interface.shortDescription: Recommend Codex plugins for a task.
interface.longDescription: Plugin Recommender adds an explicit-use Codex skill that recommends relevant plugins and skills from a bundled Korean plugin catalog. It is useful when a user wants to know which plugin or skill best fits a task before starting the work.
defaultPrompt: $plugin-recommender GitHub PR 리뷰에 맞는 플러그인을 추천해줘
